data.content:
Tests ran only on `net9.0` using:

```
dotnet test --framework net9.0
```

The `--framework` (or `-f`) flag filters to a single target framework. The build and test run targeted only `net9.0`, though no tests were discovered — you may need to verify your test adapter packages (e.g., `MSTest.TestAdapter`, `xunit.runner.visualstudio`, etc.) are referenced in the project.
